runTitle: Vercel production AI Chat performance closeout

expertAssessments.rationale: Production deployment 1c876ecb4에서 AI Chat summary query를 재측정한 결과, /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2가 status 200으로 정상 응답했고 전체 스트림 완료 시간은 약 11.1초로 release target(<30s) 안에 들어왔습니다. 응답에는 15대 서버 요약, 경고/비상 서버 식별, 권고 조치가 모두 포함됐습니다.
같은 요청에서 x-ai-latency-ms=190, x-ai-mode=streaming, x-ai-source=cloud-run, x-ai-cache-status=BYPASS를 확인했습니다. 운영 timing SSOT인 X-AI-Latency-Ms 기준으로는 관측성이 충분합니다.

completedImprovements.title: AI Chat 응답 시간 및 요약 품질 검증
completedImprovements.evidence: Production direct fetch on /api/ai/supervisor/stream/v2 finished in 11056ms with x-ai-latency-ms=190; response included 서버 현황 요약, 전체 15대, warning/critical signal, and recommendation text

notes: Deployment verified via Vercel MCP: dpl_9NNDJ5JfL26auJ6F3h7AZJXF6cAQ, commit 1c876ecb4, READY/PROMOTED.
Production direct fetch measurement: status=200, elapsedMs=11056, x-ai-latency-ms=190, x-ai-mode=streaming, x-ai-source=cloud-run, x-ai-cache-status=BYPASS.
Quality checks passed: hasSummaryTitle=true, hasTotal15Servers=true, hasRecommendation=true, hasWarningSignal=true, hasStreamingEvents=true.
Resource timing for the same request was duration=10804ms. This remains well below the release target of <30s from production-qa-2026-02-25 baseline.
This closes the stale pending item introduced by QA-20260310-0076 latency claim.
